layoutLoading.title: Opening the control center
layoutLoading.description: Kapter is verifying your Clerk session, restoring dashboard navigation, and syncing the last working surfaces before opening the control room.

pageHeader.title: Post-meeting operations dashboard
pageHeader.description: Review recordings, approve action items, and prepare the Notion sync.

errorBanner.message: Connection error, data could not be loaded

notionCallbackBanner.connectedDescription: You can now assign a Notion destination to each project from the dashboard.
notionCallbackBanner.fallbackDescription: The Notion authentication flow did not complete.

meetingPanel.title: Meetings
meetingPanel.refreshError: Unable to refresh the meeting list.
meetingPanel.emptyWithFilters: Try clearing the filters to view the full history.
meetingPanel.emptyWithoutFilters: The extension will create the first record here.

projectPanel.title: Projects & Notion
projectPanel.description: Choose a project to narrow the meeting list.

projectsPanel.title: Projects
projectsPanel.description: Create work context so recordings and future tasks land in the right place.
projectsPanel.connectedDescription: Connected to {{workspace}}. Pick one shared page per project so Kapter can create the task database there.
projectsPanel.oauthDescription: Connect Notion once, then assign one page per project or let Kapter create a dedicated page.
projectsPanel.unavailableDescription: Notion OAuth is not configured in this environment. Projects stay local until Notion OAuth is set up.
projectsPanel.newProjectDescription: Start simple. You can add more context and connect Notion later.
projectsPanel.projectDescriptionPlaceholder: What is this project about? This helps the AI analyze it more accurately.
projectsPanel.emptyProjects: No projects yet. The extension can still record into the draft project, but creating a project here gives you stable context to reuse.
projectsPanel.missingProjectDescription: This project does not have a description yet. Meetings can still be attached to it.
projectsPanel.connectWorkspaceFirst: Connect the Notion workspace first, then return here to pick the parent page for this project.
projectsPanel.destinationModeDescription: Choose whether Kapter works inside the page you pick or creates a dedicated project page.
projectsPanel.createDedicatedPageDescription: Kapter creates a child project page and places the task database inside it.
projectsPanel.useExistingPageDescription: Kapter attaches the project to the page you pick and creates the task database there.
projectsPanel.searchSharedPagePlaceholder: Search for a page you already shared with Kapter
projectsPanel.searchPagesError: Unable to search shared Notion pages.
projectsPanel.selectPageBeforeSaving: Choose a shared Notion page before saving.
projectsPanel.saveDestinationError: Unable to save the Notion destination.
projectsPanel.clearDestinationError: Unable to clear the Notion destination.
projectsPanel.savedPageFallback: A page was already saved for this project.
